query: show me the latest news for Bitcoin
explanation: I fetched recent Bitcoin news and wrapped it in a composite response. Only one section was returned because the query focused on a single topic.

articles.headline: Bitcoin Hash Rate Hits New All-Time High of 850 EH/s
articles.summary: Bitcoin's seven-day average hash rate reached 850 exahashes per second, a new all-time high. The increase reflects growing miner investment in next-generation ASICs despite the recent halving compression on margins.

articles.headline: El Salvador Announces Plans to Issue Bitcoin Volcano Bonds in Q3 2026
articles.summary: El Salvador's government announced it will proceed with the long-awaited Bitcoin-backed volcano bonds in Q3 2026, aiming to raise $1 billion for geothermal energy infrastructure powered by the country's volcanic resources.

articles.headline: Bitcoin Dominance Dips Below 48% as Altcoin Season Intensifies
articles.summary: Bitcoin's market dominance has fallen below 48% for the first time since February, as capital rotation into large-cap altcoins accelerates. Analysts suggest this could signal the early stages of a sustained altcoin season.
